# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.OccludedLowpassCutoffMinimum property

Lowpass cutoff when the listener is fully occluded by a wall. Lower values produce a heavier, more muffled sound.

```csharp
public int OccludedLowpassCutoffMinimum { get; set; }
```
